pull.title: ci: Bump GHA actions versions
pull.body: Looks like this was forgotten in  the prior pull https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34344#issuecomment-3769438233

events.body: The following sections might be updated with supplementary metadata relevant to reviewers and maintainers. ### Reviews See [the guideline](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#code-review) for information on the review process. | Type | Reviewers | | ---- | --------- | | ACK | [fanquake](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34802#issuecomment-4040092757) | | Concept ACK | [janb84](https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34802#pullrequestreview-3929833404) | If your review is incorrectly listed, please copy-paste <!--meta-tag:bot-skip--> into the comment that the bot should ignore.

> Looks like this was forgotten in the prior pull

What do you mean by "forgotten"? IIRC that pull updated any outdated Action to the latest available version, at that point in time.

concept ACK fac89d2e5b97d6c16d7bf1b6d7244336410e9636

validated updates:

docker/setup-buildx-action@v4 => [latest version is 4](https://github.com/docker/setup-buildx-action/releases/tag/v4.0.0)

actions/github-script@v6 => [latest version is 8](https://github.com/actions/github-script/releases/tag/v8)

actions/cache/restore@v5 =>
actions/cache/save@v5 =>  [latest version is 5](https://github.com/actions/cache/releases/tag/v5.0.3)

ci: Bump GHA actions versions

events.body:
> > Looks like this was forgotten in the prior pull
> 
> What do you mean by "forgotten"? IIRC that pull updated any outdated Action to the latest available version, at that point in time.

The pull was done this year, but  https://github.com/actions/github-script/releases/tag/v8 and https://github.com/actions/cache/releases/tag/v5.0.1 were released last year.

comments.body:
NIT: some other actions can also be updated

actions/upload-artifact@v6 => [actions/upload-artifact@v7 ](https://github.com/actions/upload-artifact/releases/tag/v7.0.0)

actions/download-artifact@v7 -> [actions/download-artifact@v8 ](https://github.com/actions/download-artifact/releases/tag/v8.0.0)

> NIT: some other actions can also be updated
> 
> actions/upload-artifact@v6 => [actions/upload-artifact@v7 ](https://github.com/actions/upload-artifact/releases/tag/v7.0.0)
> 
> actions/download-artifact@v7 -> [actions/download-artifact@v8 ](https://github.com/actions/download-artifact/releases/tag/v8.0.0)

Sure, done. They are not needed to be bumped in the context of node 24, but I guess it can't hurt.
Ah no, but it reduces another (possible) drive-by AI pr. tnx !
